description: Lenovo ThinkPad T14 Gen 2 (Intel) — T14 Gen 2 daily driver
notes: Verified DMI on hardware: sys_vendor=LENOVO, product_name=20W1S5DL0H (per-SKU, varies), product_version='ThinkPad T14 Gen 2i' (stable, glob match on this).
Audio: REQUIRES sof-firmware package (Intel SOF 8086:A0C8). No sound without it.
Suspend: prefer BIOS 'Windows and Linux' (S0ix) over 'Linux S3' to avoid trackpad-lag bug after S3 resume.
fwupd works for BIOS, NVMe, fingerprint reader (06CB:00F9 — Synaptics Prometheus, needs LVFS testing remote).

Host config includes user_configuration.json, local gitignored user_credentials.json, and an inline first-boot Secure Boot/TPM2 enrollment service. The test harness injects a VM-only disk_config for /dev/nvme0n1 during --drive runs.
